info.title: pakfindata API
info.description: Backend API for PSX market data. Endpoints under /v1 follow the Phase 1 contract (auth required, pydantic models). Endpoints under /api are legacy Phase-0 routers retained during the migration.

get.description: Return every row in ``data_freshness``, freshest first.

schema.title: Response List Freshness V1 Freshness Get

get.description: Return one row by PK; 404 if no such domain.

All symbols' OHLCV for the latest available trading day.

If ``as_of`` is provided, returns rows for that specific date.
Otherwise the server picks the latest day with ≥100 symbols.

parameters.name: as_of

schema.description: Override the auto-detected latest trading day (YYYY-MM-DD)
schema.title: As Of

parameters.description: Override the auto-detected latest trading day (YYYY-MM-DD)

schema.title: Response Eod Latest V1 Eod Latest Get

get.description: Advancers / decliners / unchanged for a single date.
All symbols' OHLCV for a specific date.

schema.title: Response Eod For Date V1 Eod Get

get.description:
OHLCV history for a single symbol.

Default window when neither ``from``, ``to``, nor ``limit`` is
supplied: last 90 days ending at the symbol's most recent row.
404 if the symbol has zero rows at all (typo).

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Trading-day count semantics. When supplied without explicit `from`, the from-bound is dropped and the last N rows are returned (date-descending). Combine with `to` to anchor the right edge.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Trading-day count semantics. When supplied without explicit `from`, the from-bound is dropped and the last N rows are returned (date-descending). Combine with `to` to anchor the right edge.

schema.title: Response Eod For Symbol V1 Eod  Symbol  Get

get.description: Latest snapshot for every index code in ``psx_indices``.

schema.title: Response List Indices V1 Indices Get

get.description:
Membership for an index at its latest effective date.

Returns 404 if the index code is unknown OR has no membership row
seeded yet (sync hasn't run for it).

schema.title: Response Index Constituents V1 Indices  Code  Constituents Get

get.description:
Daily history for one index, newest first.

Returns 404 if the index code is unknown (zero rows). Empty range
within a known code returns 200 with an empty list.

schema.title: Response Index History V1 Indices  Code  Get

get.description: Denormalized hero — KSE-100 quote, 52w range, and breadth.

schema.title: Response Top Gainers V1 Market Top Gainers Get
Response Top Losers V1 Market Top Losers Get
Response Volume Leaders V1 Market Volume Leaders Get

get.description: Bundle of symbols near 52w high and near 52w low (Q3).

schema.title: Response Sector Leaderboard V1 Market Sector Leaderboard Get

get.description: Top symbols by turnover (close × volume) for the latest trading day.

schema.title: Response Value Leaders V1 Market Value Leaders Get

get.description:
One row per symbol with rounded daily change % — feeds the
Market Pulse change-distribution histogram.

schema.title: Response Change Distribution V1 Market Change Distribution Get

get.description:
Recent corporate announcements (company_announcements with a
corporate_announcements fallback).

schema.title: Response Announcements V1 Market Announcements Get

get.description:
Latest snapshot from ``analytics_market_snapshot``.

This is the point-in-time aggregate the Dashboard analytics widget
consumes. 404 if no snapshot has been computed yet (empty table).

Macro rates strip (SBP policy, KIBOR-3M, T-Bill-3M, PKRV-10Y) + FX.

Missing data points return ``null`` for that field — never fabricated,
never carried-forward.

All currencies at their most recent date in the given source.

Mirrors the legacy ``_load_all_currency_rates`` Streamlit cache —
one row per currency, derived ``spread = selling - buying``.

schema.title: Response Get Fx Latest V1 Fx Latest Get

get.description: Latest row for one currency from one source.
Date-descending history for one currency in one source.

schema.title: Response Get Fx History V1 Fx History Get

get.description: ``fx_ohlcv`` history for one pair (e.g. ``USD/PKR``).

schema.title: Response Get Fx Ohlcv V1 Fx Ohlcv  Pair  Get

get.description: Distinct pairs in ``commodity_fx_rates`` (e.g. EUR/USD).

schema.title: Response Get Fx Global Pairs V1 Fx Global Pairs Get

get.description: ``commodity_fx_rates`` history for one global pair.

schema.title: Response Get Fx Global History V1 Fx Global History  Pair  Get

get.description:
Interbank-vs-kerb spread for the top 5 currencies.

Same query the legacy ``_load_spread_heatmap`` Streamlit cache used.
Returns up to ``limit`` recent rows (date-descending).

schema.title: Response Get Fx Spread Heatmap V1 Fx Spread Heatmap Get

get.description: Recent rows from ``fx_sync_runs`` (operational view).

schema.title: Response Get Fx Sync Runs V1 Fx Sync Runs Get

get.description:
All rows from ``fx_pairs`` master.

Backs the pair dropdown on fx.py + fx_history.py — replaces the
legacy ``get_fx_pairs(con, active_only=True)`` repo call.

schema.title: Response List Fx Pairs V1 Fx Pairs Get

get.description:
Returns + volatility + simple trend for one FX pair.

Wraps :func:`pakfindata.analytics_fx.get_fx_analytics` which reads
≤300 OHLCV rows and does light pandas math (returns over 1W/1M/3M/
6M/1Y, rolling volatility, sign-based trend). Light compute —
safe for blocking /v1.

The ``{pair:path}`` converter keeps the slash inside pair names
(e.g. ``USD/PKR``) intact.

Wide-format normalized performance across multiple FX pairs.

Each pair is normalized to ``base`` at the first available date in
the requested window, then carried forward. Wraps
:func:`pakfindata.analytics_fx.get_normalized_fx_performance`.

Response shape — one row per date with all pairs as additional
keys::

    [{"date": "2026-01-02", "USD/PKR": 100.0, "EUR/PKR": 100.0},
     {"date": "2026-01-03", "USD/PKR": 100.4, "EUR/PKR":  99.8},
     ...]

schema.title: Response Get Fx Normalized Performance V1 Fx Normalized Performance Get

get.description:
Pre-computed FX-adjusted equity returns from ``fx_adjusted_metrics``.

The table is populated by ``analytics_fx.compute_and_store_fx_adjusted_metrics``
(a write path — not exposed here). When empty, the page surfaces a
"Compute" button which still runs the engine directly via the
Streamlit process. Read endpoint is a thin pass-through to the repo.

schema.title: Response List Fx Adjusted Metrics V1 Fx Adjusted Metrics Get

get.description: Latest KONIA rows (date-descending).

schema.title: Response Get Konia V1 Rates Konia Get

get.description:
Latest KIBOR row per tenor (one tenor → one row), sorted by
short-end tenor first. Single round-trip vs querying history.

schema.title: Response Get Kibor Latest Per Tenor V1 Rates Kibor Latest Per Tenor Get

get.description:
KIBOR history from ``kibor_daily``.

Returns rows date-ascending so chart code can plot directly. With
no ``tenors`` arg, returns every tenor; with one, restricts to
that comma-separated set. Drops rows where ``offer`` is NULL since
chart consumers always plot offer.

schema.title: Response Get Kibor History V1 Rates Kibor Get

get.description:
Most-recent row per rate_name from ``global_reference_rates``.

If ``rate_names`` is omitted, returns the latest row for every
rate_name in the table (window-function-friendly). With
``rate_names``, restricts to the comma-separated set.

schema.title: Response Get Global Reference Rates V1 Rates Global Get
Response Get Npc Rates V1 Rates Npc Get

get.description:
Filter symbols by sector, P/E, market cap, and volume.

Returns up to ``limit`` rows ordered by market_cap desc, with
nulls last. P/E and market_cap come from ``company_fundamentals``
if populated; the table is currently empty for those fields on
most rows, so the page handles all-null gracefully.

parameters.name: sector

schema.description: Sector name; omit to return all sectors
schema.title: Sector

parameters.description: Sector name; omit to return all sectors

parameters.name: min_mcap_m

schema.description: Minimum market cap in millions of PKR
schema.title: Min Mcap M

parameters.description: Minimum market cap in millions of PKR

schema.title: Response Get Screener V1 Symbols Screener Get

get.description:
Active symbols list from the ``symbols`` master table.

Backs the symbol pickers on Group F research pages (microstructure,
signal_dashboard, etc.). Tiny query, cached on the client.

schema.title: Response Get Symbols V1 Symbols Get

get.description:
Top N symbols by aggregate volume over the last ``days`` trading days.

Feeds ml_predictions' candidate pool and signal_intelligence's
correlation heatmap.

schema.title: Response Get Top By Volume V1 Symbols Top By Volume Get

get.description:
Futures base symbols with sufficient history.

Sourced from ``futures_eod`` market_type='FUT'. Used by strategy_oi
for the symbol picker.

parameters.name: min_data_days

schema.description: Min distinct dates per base symbol
schema.title: Min Data Days

parameters.description: Min distinct dates per base symbol

schema.title: Response Get Futures Symbols V1 Symbols Futures Get

get.description:
Distinct sector names. Prefers the ``sectors`` table; falls back
to ``company_profile.sector_name`` if the master is empty.

schema.title: Response Get Sectors V1 Symbols Sectors Get

get.description:
Per-sector aggregates (avg_change, gainers/losers, total_volume)
for one trading day.

Sectors with fewer than ``min_stocks`` constituents are dropped;
defaults to ``min_stocks=2`` matching the legacy sector_analysis
convention, and the page raises to 3 for the heatmap call.

parameters.name: date

schema.description: Trading date YYYY-MM-DD; defaults to latest
schema.title: Date

parameters.description: Trading date YYYY-MM-DD; defaults to latest

parameters.name: min_stocks

schema.description: Minimum stocks per sector to include
schema.title: Min Stocks

parameters.description: Minimum stocks per sector to include

schema.title: Response Get Sector Performance V1 Sectors Performance Get

get.description:
symbol → sector_name lookup for a single trading day.

Backs the KSE-100 treemap that joins the constituent XLS with
sector labels.

parameters.name: date

schema.description: Trading date YYYY-MM-DD; defaults to latest
schema.title: Date

parameters.description: Trading date YYYY-MM-DD; defaults to latest

schema.title: Response Get Sector Symbol Map V1 Sectors Symbol Map Get

get.description: Symbols with at least one row in ``company_financials``.

schema.title: Response Get Financial Symbols V1 Companies Financial Symbols Get

get.description:
All financial rows for ``symbol``, newest period first.

Includes a derived ``is_bank`` flag (True if any row has a
non-NULL ``markup_earned`` — the same probe the legacy page used).

Symbol P/E vs sector peers from latest ``company_snapshots``.

Reads ``trading_data.REG.pe_ratio_ttm`` (the actual JSON path —
the legacy page used ``snapshot_json.fundamentals.pe_ratio`` which
is a column that never existed, so the feature was silently dead).

Returns an empty-but-valid response if the symbol has no snapshot
or sector has fewer than 3 peers — page renders no delta.

``company_profile`` + ``company_key_people`` bundle.

Both halves are independent — page handles either being absent.
Recent ``corporate_announcements`` for ``symbol``, newest first.

schema.title: Response Get Company Announcements V1 Companies  Symbol  Announcements Get

get.description:
Fallback dividend history from the global-scraper feed.

Used by Company Deep's Payouts tab when the smart-client
per-symbol payouts query returns no rows.

schema.title: Response Get Company Dividend Payouts V1 Companies  Symbol  Dividend Payouts Get

get.description:
Composite factor source: latest ``company_snapshots`` JSON
columns + price returns from ``eod_ohlcv``.

Field aliases match the legacy ``_load_factor_data`` SELECT so the
page-side scoring math is unchanged. ``snapshot_count`` is the
distinct-symbol coverage in ``company_snapshots`` — used by the
page to gate the warning banner.

90-day (or custom-window) price-range stats per symbol.

``range_pct`` = (max_close - min_close) / avg_close * 100.
Empty list if all input symbols have no recent data.

schema.title: Response Get Factor Risk Stats V1 Factors Risk Stats Get

get.description: Treasury Bill auction history, newest first.

schema.title: Response Get Tbill Auctions V1 Treasury Tbill Get

get.description: Most recent T-Bill auction for each tenor, sorted 3M→6M→12M.

schema.title: Response Get Tbill Latest Per Tenor V1 Treasury Tbill Latest Per Tenor Get

get.description: PIB auction history, newest first.

schema.title: Response Get Pib Auctions V1 Treasury Pib Get

get.description: Most recent PIB auction for each tenor, sorted 2Y→30Y.

schema.title: Response Get Pib Latest Per Tenor V1 Treasury Pib Latest Per Tenor Get

get.description: GIS (Government Ijara Sukuk) auction history, newest first.

schema.title: Response Get Gis Auctions V1 Treasury Gis Get

get.description:
PKRV (conventional sovereign curve) — by date or recent N days.

With ``date``: returns all tenors for that day, sorted by tenor_months.
Without ``date``: returns the last ``days`` distinct trading days
across all tenors, newest first.

schema.title: Response Get Pkrv V1 Yield Curves Pkrv Get

get.description: PKISRV (Islamic sovereign curve) — by date or recent N days.

schema.title: Response Get Pkisrv V1 Yield Curves Pkisrv Get

get.description:
FMA price history for a single PIB bond (newest first capped at
``limit``; oldest first when consumed by chart code via sort).

schema.title: Response Get Pkfrv Bond History V1 Yield Curves Pkfrv  Bond Code  History Get

get.description:
PKFRV (floating-rate PIB valuations) — per-bond, latest or
by date.

schema.title: Response Get Pkfrv V1 Yield Curves Pkfrv Get

get.description: Distinct source codes present in ``sovereign_curve``.

schema.title: Response Get Sovereign Sources V1 Curve Sovereign Sources Get

get.description: Distinct trading dates with curve data, newest first.

parameters.name: source

schema.description: Restrict to a single source code
schema.title: Source

parameters.description: Restrict to a single source code

schema.title: Response Get Sovereign Dates V1 Curve Sovereign Dates Get

get.description:
History of (date, yield_pct, …) for a fixed tenor across one or
more sources.

Backs the Curve Analytics history + NSS-RMSE charts.
Special tenor ``_RMSE`` returns the per-source NSS fit error.

parameters.name: sources

schema.description: Comma-separated source codes; omit for all
schema.title: Sources

parameters.description: Comma-separated source codes; omit for all

schema.title: Response Get Sovereign Tenor History V1 Curve Sovereign Tenor History Get

get.description:
Sovereign curve points from the consolidated ``sovereign_curve``
table.

Returns the day's full set across sources by default; pass
``source`` to restrict to one. ``include_synthetic=False`` filters
out the spline/NSS fits and their RMSE metadata rows.

parameters.name: include_synthetic

schema.description: Include *_SYN spline/NSS sources (default True; required by Curve Analytics)
schema.title: Include Synthetic

parameters.description: Include *_SYN spline/NSS sources (default True; required by Curve Analytics)

schema.title: Response Get Sovereign Curve V1 Curve Sovereign Get

get.description:
``sbp_bond_trading_daily`` (SMTV) — daily bond-market trading
aggregates, newest first.

schema.title: Response Get Bond Trading Daily V1 Bonds Trading Daily Get

get.description: History of a single ``sbp_benchmark_snapshot`` metric, oldest first.

schema.title: Response Get Benchmark History V1 Benchmark Snapshot History Get

get.description:
``bond_market`` repo's status dict (used to gate the Trading
Volume section).

Latest ``sbp_benchmark_snapshot`` collapsed to metric→value dict.

Returns ``{date: None, metrics: {}}`` if the table is empty or
absent (catalog status note rather than 404 — page renders
"—" tiles).
``fi_instruments`` — bond / sukuk universe.

parameters.name: category

schema.description: Filter by category (e.g. PIB, SUKUK, CORP)
schema.title: Category

parameters.description: Filter by category (e.g. PIB, SUKUK, CORP)

schema.title: Response Get Fi Instruments V1 Fi Instruments Get

get.description:
FCY-denominated instruments combined across ``fi_instruments``,
``bonds_master``, and ``sukuk_master``.

Each source table contributes a ``source_table`` discriminator
column. Any table that doesn't exist or has no FCY rows is
silently skipped (graceful degradation when, e.g., bonds_master
is unbuilt).

schema.title: Response Get Fcy Instruments V1 Fi Fcy Instruments Get

get.description: Latest ``fi_quotes`` row per instrument.

schema.title: Response Get Fi Quotes Latest V1 Fi Quotes Latest Get

get.description: Price/volume history for one FI instrument, oldest first.

schema.title: Response Get Fi Quotes History V1 Fi Quotes  Instrument Id  History Get
Response Get Alm Products V1 Alm Products Get
Response Get Alm Positions V1 Alm Positions Get
Response Get Repricing Gap V1 Alm Repricing Gap Get
Response Get Ftp Rates V1 Alm Ftp Rates Get
Response Get Sensitivity V1 Alm Sensitivity Get

get.description:
Liquidity-ladder endpoint uses :class:`GenericRow` because the
backing ``alm_liquidity_ladder`` table is currently column-shifted
(Group B finding) — rows do not validate against the strict
schema. Page consumers should treat non-numeric values defensively.

schema.title: Response Get Liquidity Ladder V1 Alm Liquidity Ladder Get

get.description: SBP policy-rate history, newest first.

schema.title: Response Get Policy History V1 Rates Policy History Get

get.description:
NPC-vs-RFR spread (from ``v_npc_vs_rfr_spread`` view).

The view may be absent (Phase 0.5 known coverage gap) — endpoint
returns ``[]`` rather than 500.

schema.title: Response Get Npc Vs Rfr Spread V1 Rates Npc Spread Get

get.description: NPC carry-trade analysis (from ``v_npc_carry_trade`` view).

schema.title: Response Get Npc Carry V1 Rates Npc Carry Get

get.description: Multi-currency dashboard view (from ``v_multicurrency_dashboard``).

schema.title: Response Get Npc Multicurrency V1 Rates Npc Multicurrency Get

get.description:
NPC yield curve (all tenors) for a currency on a date.

The underlying view ``v_npc_yield_curve`` may be absent (Phase 0.5
coverage gap) — endpoint returns ``{}`` rather than 500.
SOFR vs KIBOR 3M daily spread (from ``v_sofr_kibor_spread`` view).

schema.title: Response Get Sofr Kibor Spread V1 Rates Global Spread Sofr Kibor Get

get.description:
Latest row for every (rate_name, tenor) combination in
``global_reference_rates``.

schema.title: Response Get Global Rates Latest V1 Rates Global Latest Get

get.description: History for a single (rate_name, tenor) — date-ascending.

schema.title: Response Get Global Rate History V1 Rates Global History Get

get.description:
Latest single-row snapshot: SOFR/EFFR/KIBOR/KONIA/policy_rate.

Repo returns a flat dict (not a row set) — schema returns one
:class:`GenericRow` so JSON shape is ``{SOFR: …, EFFR: …, …}``.
Distinct dates with intraday summary, newest first.

schema.title: Response Get Intraday Dates V1 Intraday Dates Get

get.description: Per-symbol day OHLCV summary from ``intraday_daily_summary``.

schema.title: Response Get Intraday Summary V1 Intraday Summary Get

get.description: Single-symbol tick bars from ``intraday_bars``.

schema.title: Response Get Intraday Bars V1 Intraday Bars Get

get.description: Minute-level breadth from ``intraday_minute_breadth``.

schema.title: Response Get Intraday Minute Breadth V1 Intraday Breadth Minute Get

get.description: Hourly tick / symbol counts from ``intraday_hourly_summary``.

schema.title: Response Get Intraday Hourly Breadth V1 Intraday Breadth Hourly Get

get.description:
Per-minute index values from ``intraday_index_minute``.

Renames ``last_value`` to ``value`` to match the field on
:class:`IntradayIndexMinuteRow`.

schema.title: Response Get Intraday Index Minute V1 Intraday Index Minute Get

get.description: Aggregate stats over ``post_close_turnover``.
Distinct dates with post_close data, newest first.

schema.title: Response Get Turnover Dates V1 Turnover Dates Get

get.description: Dates with EOD but no post_close_turnover rows.

schema.title: Response Get Turnover Missing V1 Turnover Missing Get

get.description: Rows from ``post_close_turnover`` with optional filters.

schema.title: Response Get Turnover V1 Turnover Get

get.description:
Distinct dates with tick data for a symbol, newest first.

Single ``SELECT DISTINCT date`` against the DuckDB ``tick_logs``
view. Sub-second on the cached connection.

schema.title: Response Get Tick Logs Dates V1 Tick Logs Dates  Symbol  Get

get.description:
Most-recent active futures contract for an underlying.

Filters market_type IN ('FUT', 'CONT'), close > 0,
contract_month NOT NULL. Returns the single newest row by
(date, contract_month) — i.e. the front-month contract on the
latest date that has data.
Distinct category values from mutual_funds (Equity, Money Market, ...).

schema.title: Response List Fund Categories V1 Funds Categories Get

get.description: Distinct AMC code + name with fund count.

schema.title: Response List Amcs V1 Funds Amcs Get

get.description:
Latest NAV per fund (cross-fund table).

Uses a window function over ``mutual_fund_nav`` to pick the most
recent row per fund_id; left-joins ``mutual_funds`` for the
display name.

schema.title: Response List Funds Nav Latest V1 Funds Nav Latest Get

get.description:
Top (or bottom) N funds by a given pre-computed return metric.

``metric`` is allowlisted via the regex pattern to prevent
SQL-identifier injection. ``category`` filter is parameterized.

schema.title: Response List Performance Leaders V1 Funds Performance Leaders Get

get.description: List funds from mutual_funds with optional filters.

schema.title: Response List Funds V1 Funds Get

get.description: Single fund metadata.
NAV history for one fund.

schema.title: Response Get Fund Nav V1 Funds  Fund Id  Nav Get

get.description: Pre-computed performance metrics for one fund (1 row or None).

schema.title: Response Get Fund Performance V1 Funds  Fund Id  Performance Get

get.description: Risk metrics for one fund (1 row or None).

schema.title: Response Get Fund Risk V1 Funds  Fund Id  Risk Get

get.description: Yearly returns for one fund.

schema.title: Response Get Fund Calendar Returns V1 Funds  Fund Id  Calendar Returns Get

get.description: List all ETFs from etf_master.

schema.title: Response List Etfs V1 Etfs Get

get.description: Single ETF metadata.
NAV history for one ETF.

schema.title: Response Get Etf Nav V1 Etfs  Symbol  Nav Get

get.description:
Composite gate — does ANY of the 3 commodity tables have rows.

Powers the empty-state guard in ``render_commodities``. Returns
individual counts so the page can show a tighter message if only
one feed is missing.
DISTINCT symbol from ``commodity_eod``.

schema.title: Response List Commodity Symbols V1 Commodities Symbols Get

get.description: DISTINCT pair from ``commodity_fx_rates``.

schema.title: Response List Commodity Fx Pairs V1 Commodities Fx Pairs Get

get.description:
Latest + previous close per symbol with FX fallback.

For each requested symbol, returns the latest row from
``commodity_eod`` (yfinance source). If no row is found, falls back
to ``commodity_fx_rates`` (where the FX-style symbol e.g.
USD_PKR lives). ``prev_close`` is the close from the previous row,
or the same row's ``open`` if only one row exists. Symbols with no
data in either table are omitted from the response.

schema.title: Response Get Commodity Latest V1 Commodities Latest Get

get.description: Average daily change by ``commodity_symbols.category`` (latest session).

schema.title: Response Get Commodity Sector Performance V1 Commodities Sector Performance Get

get.description: Latest PKR-converted price per symbol from ``commodity_pkr``.

schema.title: Response Get Commodity Pkr Latest V1 Commodities Pkr Latest Get

get.description:
Latest yfinance row per symbol with category metadata JOIN.

Powers the Categories tab table + change heatmap. Rows missing a
``commodity_symbols`` entry still appear (LEFT JOIN), with NULL
category/name/unit.

schema.title: Response Get Commodity Categories Latest V1 Commodities Categories Latest Get

get.description: Recent rows from ``commodity_sync_runs`` ledger.

schema.title: Response List Commodity Sync Runs V1 Commodities Sync Runs Get

get.description:
Bulk export for the Export tab.

The page originally did ``SELECT *`` with NO row cap, which would
OOM on ``commodity_fx_rates`` (1.8M rows). We allowlist the dataset
name (cannot be parameterized as identifier) and cap the row count.
The default 5000 matches typical "preview + CSV download" use; the
max 200K covers wider exports without going pathological.

parameters.name: dataset

schema.description: One of: eod | monthly | pkr | fx | khistocks | pmex_market_watch
schema.title: Dataset

parameters.description: One of: eod | monthly | pkr | fx | khistocks | pmex_market_watch

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Row cap — defaults to 5000 to avoid 100MB+ payloads
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Row cap — defaults to 5000 to avoid 100MB+ payloads

schema.title: Response Export Commodity Dataset V1 Commodities Export  Dataset  Get

get.description:
OHLCV history for one symbol with FX fallback.

Tries ``commodity_eod`` (yfinance) first. If empty, falls back to
``commodity_fx_rates`` (FX-style symbols like USD_PKR). Date order
is most-recent first; the caller sorts ascending for charting.

parameters.name: symbol

schema.description: Symbol or FX pair e.g. GOLD, USD_PKR
schema.title: Symbol

parameters.description: Symbol or FX pair e.g. GOLD, USD_PKR

schema.title: Response Get Commodity Eod V1 Commodities  Symbol  Eod Get

get.description: PKR price history for one symbol.

schema.title: Response Get Commodity Pkr History V1 Commodities  Symbol  Pkr Get

get.description: DISTINCT feed from ``khistocks_prices``.

get.description: Latest row per (symbol, feed). Optionally filtered to one feed.

schema.title: Response Get Khistocks Latest V1 Khistocks Latest Get

get.description: Price history for one khistocks symbol (all feeds the symbol appears in).

schema.title: Response Get Khistocks History V1 Khistocks  Symbol  History Get

get.description: DISTINCT category from ``pmex_market_watch``.

schema.title: Response List Pmex Portal Categories V1 Pmex Portal Categories Get

get.description: Latest snapshot per contract. Optionally filtered to one category.

schema.title: Response Get Pmex Portal Latest V1 Pmex Portal Latest Get

get.description: Snapshot history for one PMEX-portal contract.

schema.title: Response Get Pmex Portal History V1 Pmex Portal  Contract  History Get

get.description: Counts + date range for FIPI/LIPI/sector/derived tables.
Recent daily FIPI rows (date-desc).

schema.title: Response List Nccpl Fipi V1 Nccpl Fipi Get

get.description: Recent daily LIPI rows (date-desc) — mf/insurance/bank/retail/etc.

schema.title: Response List Nccpl Lipi V1 Nccpl Lipi Get

get.description: Distinct trading dates with sector flow data (date-desc).

schema.title: Response List Nccpl Sector Dates V1 Nccpl Sector Dates Get

get.description: Per-sector foreign flows for one trading date (sorted by fpi_net desc).

schema.title: Response List Nccpl Sector V1 Nccpl Sector Get

get.description:
Last N days of sector flows for the heatmap viz.

Returns long-format rows; the page pivots to a (sector × date)
matrix for plotly Heatmap.

schema.title: Response Get Nccpl Sector Heatmap V1 Nccpl Sector Heatmap Get

get.description: Full derived signal series (date-asc — order matches page expectation).

schema.title: Response List Nccpl Flows Derived V1 Nccpl Flows Derived Get

get.description:
List every user table in the SQLite catalog.

Excludes SQLite internal tables (``sqlite_%``) and indexes.

schema.title: Response List Tables V1 Admin Tables Get

get.description:
PRAGMA table_info equivalent — column name, type, PK flag.

Backs the Schema Browser tab in research_terminal.py. Same
allowlist guard as the other admin endpoints (table resolved via
``sqlite_master``).

schema.title: Response Get Table Columns V1 Admin Tables  Table  Columns Get

get.description: ``MAX(col)`` over a single table, for staleness dashboards.

``SELECT DISTINCT col FROM table ORDER BY col`` — symbol-list pickers etc.

Returns up to ``limit`` rows. NULLs are filtered out.

parameters.name: col

schema.description: Column whose distinct values to list (allowlisted)
schema.title: Col

parameters.description: Column whose distinct values to list (allowlisted)

schema.title: Response Get Table Distinct Values V1 Admin Tables  Table  Distinct Get

get.description:
``COUNT(DISTINCT col)`` for a single table column.

Backs data-quality coverage dashboards that show e.g. "symbols
with EOD data" = COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) in eod_ohlcv.

``GROUP BY ... HAVING COUNT(*) > 1`` for a single table.

Backs the Data Quality page's duplicate detection. ``by`` columns
are allowlisted before interpolation.

SQLite file + WAL size, index count, free-page count, per-table counts.

Wraps :func:`pakfindata.db.maintenance.get_db_stats`. Read-only —
DOES NOT vacuum/analyze/integrity-check (those stay as page-side
write actions per Phase 1.7 reads-only rule).

Recent rows from ``sync_runs``.

Distinct from ``/v1/jobs`` — ``sync_runs`` is the legacy ledger
written by the pre-Phase-1.4 ``pakfindata.sync.*`` entrypoints
(intraday, eod, financials). Both surfaces remain populated by
different code paths during the migration.

parameters.name: completed_only

schema.description: Only return runs with ended_at NOT NULL
schema.title: Completed Only

parameters.description: Only return runs with ended_at NOT NULL

schema.title: Response List Sync Runs V1 Admin Sync Runs Get

get.description: Recent rows from ``sync_failures``.

schema.title: Response List Sync Failures V1 Admin Sync Runs Failures Get

get.description:
List DuckDB-native tables/views (catalog ``memory`` only).

The SQLite ATTACH catalog (``sq``) is excluded — those tables are
already served by ``/v1/admin/tables`` and would otherwise appear
twice when both catalogs are walked.

Second /v1 route to use ``get_analytics_con`` after
``/v1/tick-logs/dates/{symbol}`` from 1.7.F.0.

schema.title: Response List Duckdb Tables V1 Admin Duckdb Tables Get

get.description: Most recent ``sync_runs`` rows, newest first.

schema.title: Response Sync Runs V1 Sync Runs Get

post.description: Enqueue a job; returns 202 with the new job_id.

get.description: Recent jobs, newest first; optional status / type filters.

schema.title: Response List Recent Jobs V1 Jobs Get

post.description: Cancel a pending job. 404 if unknown; 409 if already running/finished.

get.description:
Get EOD OHLCV table statistics.

Returns counts, date range, and breakdown by source/processname.

List available CSV files.

Returns list of CSV files with their status (exists, in DB, etc.)

parameters.name: not_loaded_only

schema.description: Only return files not in DB
schema.title: Not Loaded Only

parameters.description: Only return files not in DB

post.description:
Load specific dates into eod_ohlcv table.

This is a synchronous operation for small batches.
For large batches, use /api/tasks/start-load instead.

get.description: Get information about a specific date.

post.description:
Start a background EOD load task.

Downloads and loads EOD data for the specified date range.
Returns immediately with a task_id to check status.

get.description: Get status of a background task.
List recent tasks.
List all symbols with optional filters.
List all sectors with codes and names.
Get detail for a specific symbol.
Get latest values for all indices (KSE-100, KSE-30, etc.).
Get latest value and history for a specific index.
Get market breadth — gainers, losers, unchanged counts.
Get current regular market data.
Get latest market statistics.
Full market snapshot — KSE-100, breadth, top movers.
Get top gainers or losers from latest trading day.
Get sector summary — count of symbols and average change per sector.
Get unified company data (profile, fundamentals, latest quote).
Get company profile.
Get company fundamentals (market cap, P/E, EPS, etc.).
Get company financial statements.
Get historical quote snapshots.
List all instruments.
Get detail for a specific instrument.
Get OHLCV data for an instrument.

Get latest FX rates for all pairs.

Get FX rate history for a currency.
Get KIBOR rate history. Without date filters, returns latest rates.
Get KONIA rate history. Without date filters, returns latest rate.
Get latest SBP policy rate.
Get FX snapshot (rates + KIBOR + signals) from FX microservice.
Get FX-equity regime signal with sector exposure guide.
Get SBP intervention report (FXIM published data + statistical).
Check if FX microservice is reachable.

post.description: Sync today's FX snapshot (rates + KIBOR) into local DB.

Backfill historical FX rates from FX microservice into local DB.

Call this once on first setup, or anytime to fill date gaps.
Uses INSERT OR IGNORE — only fills gaps, never overwrites.

schema.description: End date YYYY-MM-DD, defaults to today
schema.title: To Date

parameters.description: End date YYYY-MM-DD, defaults to today

get.description: Collector health check — is the tick service running?
Full live snapshot for API consumers.
Recent 5-second OHLCV bars for a symbol from EOD tick database.
Get latest values of all global reference rates.

schema.description: Filter by rate name (e.g. SOFR, EFFR)

Get EFFR history.

Latest NPC rates, optionally filtered by currency.

NPC yield curve for a currency (all tenors).
NPC premium over global risk-free rates (SOFR, SONIA, EUSTR).
NPC vs KIBOR carry trade analysis.

Get historical values for a specific benchmark metric.
Get OTC bond trading data with optional filters.
Get daily aggregate trading volume trend.

get.description: Public root banner.

AdminDbStats.title: AdminDbStats
AdminDbStats.description: SQLite file + WAL stats + index/free-page counts + per-table counts.

AdminDistinctCount.title: AdminDistinctCount
AdminDistinctCount.description: COUNT(DISTINCT col) for a single table column.

AdminDuckdbTableRow.title: AdminDuckdbTableRow
AdminDuckdbTableRow.description:
One row from a DuckDB catalog enumeration.

Only DuckDB-native objects (catalog ``memory``) are returned — the
SQLite ATTACH passthrough is excluded so callers don't see every
SQLite table double-listed alongside ``/v1/admin/tables``.

AdminDuplicateRow.title: AdminDuplicateRow
AdminDuplicateRow.description:
One duplicate group from a GROUP BY ... HAVING COUNT > 1 query.

``key`` carries the grouping columns as a dict so the schema is
polymorphic per table (eod_ohlcv groups by symbol+date,
company_fundamentals by symbol alone, etc.).

AdminLatestDate.title: AdminLatestDate
AdminLatestDate.description: Latest date in a given table's date column.

AdminTableRow.title: AdminTableRow
AdminTableRow.description: One row from a sqlite_master enumeration with optional row_count.

AlmFtpRow.title: AlmFtpRow
AlmFtpRow.description: One row from the FTP-rates analytics (per product, per as-of-date).

AlmRepricingGapRow.title: AlmRepricingGapRow
AlmRepricingGapRow.description: One row from the repricing-gap analytics.

Announcement.title: Announcement
Announcement.description:
Recent corporate announcement (company_announcements with a
corporate_announcements fallback).

BenchmarkSnapshot.title: BenchmarkSnapshot
BenchmarkSnapshot.description: Latest benchmark snapshot as a metric→value dict + the date.

ChangeDistributionRow.title: ChangeDistributionRow
ChangeDistributionRow.description:
Histogram-bucket row from get_change_distribution.

One symbol → one rounded change percent. Clients bin these for the
breadth histogram.

CommodityCategoryLatestRow.title: CommodityCategoryLatestRow
CommodityCategoryLatestRow.description: Latest row per symbol JOIN ``commodity_symbols`` for category browse.

CommodityHasData.title: CommodityHasData
CommodityHasData.description: Composite gate for the empty-state render in ``commodities.py``.

CommodityLatestRow.title: CommodityLatestRow
CommodityLatestRow.description: Latest + previous close for one commodity (powers KPI cards).

CommoditySyncRunRow.title: CommoditySyncRunRow
CommoditySyncRunRow.description: One row from ``commodity_sync_runs`` (page renders raw schema).

CompanyDividendPayout.title: CompanyDividendPayout
CompanyDividendPayout.description:
One row from ``dividend_payouts`` — global-scraper fallback feed.

Used by Company Deep's Payouts tab when the smart-client
``payouts_df`` (per-symbol cash/bonus history) is empty.

CompanyFinancialsResponse.title: CompanyFinancialsResponse
CompanyFinancialsResponse.description:
Financials envelope including the derived ``is_bank`` flag.

``is_bank`` is True if any of the symbol's financial rows has a
non-NULL ``markup_earned`` — the same probe the legacy page used.

CompanyFinancialsRow.title: CompanyFinancialsRow
CompanyFinancialsRow.description:
One row from ``company_financials`` — wide schema covering both
non-financial (sales / gross_profit / …) and banking (markup_earned
/ net_interest_income / provisions / …) layouts.

The Symbol Financials page renders different tabs based on
``is_bank`` (derived server-side from markup_earned presence) and
on which columns are populated for the symbol.

CompanyProfileExtras.title: CompanyProfileExtras
CompanyProfileExtras.description:
Profile + key-people bundle used by Company Deep.

Either field may be empty; the page handles missing data
individually rather than treating the bundle as all-or-nothing.

EodBreadth.title: EodBreadth
EodBreadth.description: Advancers / decliners / unchanged for a single date.

EodRow.title: EodRow
EodRow.description: One row of daily OHLCV from ``eod_ohlcv``.

FXAnalyticsResponse.title: FXAnalyticsResponse
FXAnalyticsResponse.description:
Analytics computed from ``fx_ohlcv`` for one pair.

Returned by :func:`pakfindata.analytics_fx.get_fx_analytics` —
returns + volatility + simple trend. Light compute (pure pandas
over ≤300 rows); safe to serve via blocking /v1 endpoint.

FXNormalizedRow.title: FXNormalizedRow
FXNormalizedRow.description:
One row of the wide-format normalized-performance table.

Each row carries one date and one value per requested pair. Extra
keys are pair names → numeric values; mode=allow lets pydantic
keep them without per-pair schema fields.

FXOhlcvRow.title: FXOhlcvRow
FXOhlcvRow.description: Daily OHLC for an FX pair (``fx_ohlcv`` table).

FXPairRow.title: FXPairRow
FXPairRow.description:
One row from ``fx_pairs`` (pair master).

Extra columns kept tolerant — table varies between deployments
(some have ``base_currency`` / ``quote_currency`` / ``description``
columns, others don't).

FXRateRow.title: FXRateRow
FXRateRow.description:
One row from ``sbp_fx_interbank`` / ``forex_kerb`` /
``sbp_fx_open_market`` — same shape, different source table.

``spread`` is derived (``selling - buying``) and only set when both
legs are present.

FXSpreadRow.title: FXSpreadRow
FXSpreadRow.description:
One row of the interbank-vs-kerb spread heatmap.

``spread`` = ``kerb.selling - interbank.selling`` for the same
(currency, date).

FXSyncRunRow.title: FXSyncRunRow
FXSyncRunRow.description: One row from ``fx_sync_runs`` — operational sync history.

FactorRawData.title: FactorRawData
FactorRawData.description:
Factor-data envelope with the snapshot-coverage count.

``snapshot_count`` (distinct symbols in ``company_snapshots``) is
used by the page to warn if coverage is too thin for meaningful
rankings (<10 companies).

FactorRiskRow.title: FactorRiskRow
FactorRiskRow.description:
One symbol's 90-day price-range stats from ``eod_ohlcv``.

``range_pct`` = (max_close - min_close) / avg_close * 100 — the
legacy page's volatility proxy. Days = number of trading days in
the window with a row for this symbol.

FactorRow.title: FactorRow
FactorRow.description:
One symbol's flattened factor-data row.

Reads from the latest ``company_snapshots`` per symbol + the
latest 60 trading days of ``eod_ohlcv``. Field names mirror the
legacy ``_load_factor_data`` SELECT aliases so the page-side
scoring math doesn't need to change.

FiftyTwoWeekExtremes.title: FiftyTwoWeekExtremes
FiftyTwoWeekExtremes.description: Bundle near-high + near-low — one widget, one round-trip.

FiftyTwoWeekRow.title: FiftyTwoWeekRow
FiftyTwoWeekRow.description:
Row shape from get_52w_extremes: ``symbol`` + position percent.

``pos_pct`` is 100 at the 52-week high, 0 at the 52-week low.

FreshnessRow.title: FreshnessRow
FreshnessRow.description:
One row from the ``data_freshness`` table.

Fields mirror the SQLite schema column-for-column.

FundCalendarReturnRow.title: FundCalendarReturnRow
FundCalendarReturnRow.description: One row from ``fund_calendar_returns`` — yearly return per fund.

FundNavLatestRow.title: FundNavLatestRow
FundNavLatestRow.description: Latest NAV for one fund (cross-fund table).

FuturesContractRow.title: FuturesContractRow
FuturesContractRow.description:
One row from ``futures_eod`` — a single futures/CONT contract.

Backs the futures-basis tile in signal_dashboard's intelligence
brief: latest active contract per base symbol with close + volume +
contract_month.

GenericRow.title: GenericRow
GenericRow.description:
Flexible row used by view-backed endpoints whose column shape
depends on missing-or-present views (NPC carry, NPC spread,
multicurrency dashboard, SOFR–KIBOR spread).

Every field is Optional + arbitrary keys are dropped at serialize
time — caller is responsible for handling absence.

GlobalReferenceRateRow.title: GlobalReferenceRateRow
GlobalReferenceRateRow.description:
One row from ``global_reference_rates``.

Source field is typically ``'nyfed'`` (SOFR/EFFR from FRBNY) or
``'boe'`` (SONIA), ``'ecb'`` (EUSTR), ``'boj'`` (TONA).

IndexConstituent.title: IndexConstituent
IndexConstituent.description:
Membership row for an index.

Mirrors the columns returned by
``db/repositories/instruments.get_index_constituents`` — weights
and share counts aren't stored on ``instrument_membership``, so
only identity fields surface here.

IndexHistoryRow.title: IndexHistoryRow
IndexHistoryRow.description: One day of history for an index.

IndexLatest.title: IndexLatest
IndexLatest.description: Latest row from ``psx_indices`` for a single index code.

IntradayBarRow.title: IntradayBarRow
IntradayBarRow.description: One row from ``intraday_bars`` — single-symbol tick bar.

IntradayIndexMinuteRow.title: IntradayIndexMinuteRow
IntradayIndexMinuteRow.description: One row from ``intraday_index_minute`` — per-minute index value.

IntradaySummaryRow.title: IntradaySummaryRow
IntradaySummaryRow.description: One row from ``intraday_daily_summary`` — per-symbol day OHLCV.

JobDetail.title: JobDetail
JobDetail.description: Full row from the ``jobs`` table — used by GET endpoints.

KSE100Hero.title: KSE100Hero
KSE100Hero.description:
Dashboard's hero widget — KSE-100 quote + breadth + 52w range.

Fields drawn from ``psx_indices`` (via ``get_latest_kse100``) plus
breadth from ``eod_market_summary`` (via ``get_eod_breadth``).

KhistocksRow.title: KhistocksRow
KhistocksRow.description:
One row from ``khistocks_prices``.

Schema is wide because the table merges 5 different feeds with
feed-specific columns (LME uses cash_buyer/seller; Mandi uses
rate+quotation; etc.). All extra fields are tolerated.

KiborRow.title: KiborRow
KiborRow.description:
One row from ``kibor_daily`` — Karachi InterBank Offered Rate.

Optional Bid kept Optional since EasyData sometimes only exposes offer.

LoadResult.title: LoadResult
LoadResult.description: Result of loading a single date.

MarketAnalytics.title: MarketAnalytics
MarketAnalytics.description:
Latest snapshot from ``analytics_market_snapshot``.

Point-in-time aggregate: breadth + volume + top mover symbols.
Used by Dashboard for the analytics widget.

Mover.title: Mover
Mover.description: Row shape returned by get_top_movers / get_volume_leaders.

NPCRatesRow.title: NPCRatesRow
NPCRatesRow.description:
One row from ``npc_rates`` — non-prepayable carry rates.

Schema fields mirror the SQLite ``npc_rates`` table column-for-column:
``date | effective_date | currency | tenor | rate | certificate_type | source``.
The companion ``npc_carry_*`` views are missing per Phase 0.5
coverage gaps; the base table itself has data.

NccplCoverage.title: NccplCoverage
NccplCoverage.description: Row counts + date range — backs the data-coverage strip.

PkfrvRow.title: PkfrvRow
PkfrvRow.description: One row from ``pkfrv_daily``. Per-bond floating-rate valuations.

PkisrvRow.title: PkisrvRow
PkisrvRow.description: One row from ``pkisrv_daily``. Tenor is a text label (e.g. '3M', '6M').

PkrvRow.title: PkrvRow
PkrvRow.description: One row from ``pkrv_daily``. Note: tenor is months (INTEGER).

PolicyRateRow.title: PolicyRateRow
PolicyRateRow.description:
One row from ``sbp_policy_rates``.

``rate_date`` is the column actually populated; ``effective_date``
alias kept for legacy callers.

RatesStrip.title: RatesStrip
RatesStrip.description:
Dashboard top-bar strip — key rates + FX, single round-trip.

Field shapes:
    sbp_policy_rate / _date              ← sbp_policy_rates
    kibor_3m_bid / _offer / _date        ← kibor_daily (tenor=3M)
    tbill_3m_cutoff / _date              ← tbill_auctions (tenor=3M)
    pkrv_10y_yield / _date               ← pkrv_daily (tenor_months=120)

A missing point leaves both value and date None — no fabrication.

ScreenerRow.title: ScreenerRow
ScreenerRow.description:
One row of the Stock Screener result set.

Sourced from ``symbols`` LEFT JOINed with ``regular_market_current``,
``company_fundamentals``, ``company_profile``, and the latest
``eod_ohlcv`` row. Any field can be NULL when the underlying source
is missing — the UI renders ``—`` rather than a synthetic value.

SectorPerformanceRow.title: SectorPerformanceRow
SectorPerformanceRow.description:
One row of per-sector aggregates from a single trading day.

Computed by GROUP BY over ``eod_ohlcv`` joined with ``sectors``.
Sector names with fewer than 2 stocks for the date are filtered
out at the source (sector_analysis page convention).

SectorSymbolMapRow.title: SectorSymbolMapRow
SectorSymbolMapRow.description:
One symbol→sector_name mapping for a given trading day.

Backs the index-weight treemap; left-joined with the constituent
XLS file on the page side.

SectorValuation.title: SectorValuation
SectorValuation.description:
Symbol P/E vs sector peers from latest ``company_snapshots`` rows.

Reads ``trading_data.REG.pe_ratio_ttm`` from the JSON column
(NB: not ``snapshot_json.fundamentals.pe_ratio`` — that path was
referenced in the legacy page but the column never existed, so the
feature was silently dead. /v1 now reads the actual JSON path).

``pe_percentile`` is 0..100 representing what fraction of the
sector is cheaper than this symbol (lower = symbol is cheap).
None when sector has fewer than 3 peers with valid P/E.

SovereignCurveRow.title: SovereignCurveRow
SovereignCurveRow.description:
One row from ``sovereign_curve``.

Includes synthetic rows (``source`` ending in ``_SYN``) with their
associated ``_RMSE`` metadata — Curve Analytics depends on these.

StartLoadTaskRequest.title: StartLoadTaskRequest
StartLoadTaskRequest.description: Request to start EOD load task.

SymbolRow.title: SymbolRow
SymbolRow.description:
One row from the ``symbols`` master.

Backs the bare ``/v1/symbols`` listing — what Group F's research
pages (microstructure, signal_dashboard) read for symbol pickers.

SymbolVolumeRow.title: SymbolVolumeRow
SymbolVolumeRow.description:
symbol + recent-window aggregated volume.

Backs ``/v1/symbols/top-by-volume`` — feeds ml_predictions' feature
pool and signal_intelligence's correlation heatmap.

SyncRunRow.title: SyncRunRow
SyncRunRow.description: One row from ``sync_runs`` (legacy sync ledger, pre-Phase-1.4).

ValueLeader.title: ValueLeader
ValueLeader.description: Row shape from get_value_leaders — adds turnover to the Mover shape.
